summary: Example Letta runtime session summary. This is not canonical memory.
candidate_observations: The operator used a Letta runtime to explore a Grace-Mar workflow.
The Letta runtime produced a summary for human review.
runtime_memory_notes: Letta may retain its own runtime memory, but Grace-Mar does not treat this as Record truth.
recommended_review: Review only if the operator wants to stage a candidate through Grace-Mar's existing gate.
boundary: Runtime-only. Not SELF, EVIDENCE, SKILLS, or SELF-LIBRARY.
